buildCommand: echo "DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL" > .env && echo "DATABASE_DIRECT_URL=$DATABASE_DIRECT_URL" >> .env && echo "NEXTAUTH_SECRET=$NEXTAUTH_SECRET" >> .env && echo "CALENDSO_ENCRYPTION_KEY=$CALENDSO_ENCRYPTION_KEY" >> .env && echo "NEXTAUTH_URL=$NEXTAUTH_URL" >> .env && echo "NEXT_PUBLIC_WEBAPP_URL=$NEXT_PUBLIC_WEBAPP_URL" >> .env && npx turbo run build --filter=@calcom/web
